mapper.select: SELECT sp.saving_product_id AS savingId, sp.kor_co_nm AS bankName, sp.fin_prdt_nm AS savingName, so.intr_rate AS basicRate, so.intr_rate2 AS maxRate, fc.company_image AS companyImage FROM saving_product sp JOIN saving_option so ON sp.fin_prdt_cd = so.fin_prdt_cd JOIN financial_companies fc ON sp.fin_co_no2 = fc.fin_co_no WHERE sp.persona_id = #{personaId}
